examples: Ron Artest can rinse with Listerine for 60 seconds.
This phrase, surprisingly, was used to sell Listerine mouthwash!
Balm for broken blisters... To disinfect a broken blister, dab on a few drops of Listerine, a powerful antiseptic.
Ultimately, this unlocked the idea for Listerine Breath Strips: portable breath fresheners in a candy format.
The success of Aquafresh gum and Listerine mouthwash strips is inspiring innovative additions to gum, such as the milk-derived Recaldent and bleaches in Adams' Trident White brand.
